title: Marbella Port Boat Rental Guide 2026: Groups, Costs & Tips
html:
Planning a group outing from Marbella Port can be straightforward when you compare verified boats on BoatHire24. The marina at Puerto Deportivo de Marbella is the main departure point, with half-day motorboat hires from around EUR 800 for a party of ten. Whether you want a relaxed cruise along the Costa del Sol or a full-day adventure to Cabo Pino, booking early in 2026 secures the best choice.

Where to set off in Marbella Port

Puerto Deportivo de Marbella is the central harbour for private charters, with dedicated berths for vessels up to 30 metres. Nearby, Cabopino Marina offers a quieter alternative with direct access to nudist beaches and the Artola Dunes. For a longer getaway, launch from Puerto Banús, six kilometres west, where superyachts line the pontoons. The bay of Marbella itself stretches from Playa de la Fontanilla to the Venus Beach area, providing calm water for beginners. You can boat rental Marbella Port for your chosen dates.

Which boat to rent

  1. Motorboat (6, 8 pax), Ideal for half-day coastal hops to Calahonda or Cabopino; from EUR 600.
  2. Sailing yacht (8, 10 pax), Perfect for a sunset cruise along the Gold Coast; from EUR 900.
  3. Catamaran (10, 12 pax), Stable platform for swimming at the Cabo Pino nudist beach; from EUR 1,200.
  4. Luxury motor yacht (12, 14 pax), Full-day trip to Marbella’s main landmarks with onboard crew; from EUR 2,500; see the Maiora 26m listing for a top-tier option.
  5. RIB (6, 8 pax), Fast rides to the western coast for water-sports; from EUR 700.

How much does it cost to rent a boat in Marbella Port?

Prices range from EUR 500 for a small motorboat half-day to over EUR 4,000 for a crewed 20-metre yacht. Use the boat rental Marbella Port page to filter by group size and budget. One option worth a look is the Maiora 26m listing.

  • Shared tour: EUR 80, 180 per person for a 3-hour trip with up to 12 passengers.
  • Small motorboat half-day (4 hours): EUR 500, 900 without fuel.
  • Catamaran full-day (8 hours): EUR 1,500, 2,500 for up to 12 guests.
  • Crewed luxury yacht (day charter): EUR 3,500, 5,000 including skipper and fuel, for groups of 10, 14.

Do you need a licence to rent a boat in Marbella Port?

Spanish law requires a licence for bareboat rentals, but skippered charters are available without one. For motorboats over a certain power (typically above 15 CV per passenger) you need a ‘Licencia de Navegación’ or an International Certificate of Competence. The operator confirms exact requirements at time of booking. High season runs from June to September, when the Levante wind can pick up in the afternoons.

Book a morning departure in July or August to avoid the Levante wind that often builds from 2 PM, especially west of Marbella towards Estepona.

At a glance

  • Price band: EUR 500, 5,000 per charter
  • Peak months: June, July, August, September
  • Typical trip length: 4 or 8 hours
  • Max group capacity: 14 guests on larger yachts
  • Currency: EUR
  • Popular boat brands: Azimut, Sunseeker, Maiora, Axopar

Questions about boat rental in Marbella Port

Can I rent a boat for just three hours?

Yes, many operators offer short twilight cruises at around EUR 150 per person, suitable for small groups.

Is it cheaper to rent a boat on weekdays?

Weekday rentals are often 15, 20 per cent cheaper than weekend rates, especially from Monday to Thursday.

What happens if the weather is bad?

Charter companies typically reschedule or refund in full if the Port Authority closes the port due to storms.

Do I need to bring my own food and drink?

Most skippered boats allow you to bring your own provisions, and some offer a catering upgrade at an extra cost.

BoatHire24 is the worldwide marketplace where you can rent a boat in Marbella Port or list your own. Browse verified listings, compare prices, and book directly with local operators. If you own a boat, consider listing it on BoatHire24 to reach thousands of eager sailors across the globe.

Written by the BoatHire24 team, who book and list verified boats in Marbella Port and hundreds of destinations worldwide.
